posts.author: iruser (iruser)
posts.cookedHtml:
New to monday discussion boards.

Learning about mirror boards.

I have been able to make a board that links together three other boards and pull the notes and status fields onto that board.

I now want to add another mirror column and i get prompted to connect to boards again. I want to use the existing link. Am i limited to two linked columns?

When i use the Kanban view for this linked board is it going to show me the status of the board item or the linked board items? If not out of box the linked board items, what is the point? I dont want to have to manually choose a status for the linked board.

posts.author: Bree (Bree)
posts.cookedHtml:
Three-dot menu/Settings/Customize Mirror column
Then click the Connect button.
Then select the name of the Connect boards column for the board you want to mirror.

posts.author: iruser (iruser)
posts.cookedHtml:
HI Bree

Thanks for the reply. Will that not result in a second link board column? Something i do not want to have.

posts.author: Bree (Bree)
posts.cookedHtml: You shouldn’t end up with a second link board column. Check this out, and let me know if you’re seeing something different.
